title: Ouroboros Wiki Page Frontmatter Schema
description: Frontmatter schema for Ouroboros wiki and raw evidence pages

type.description: Page type — determines content structure and lifecycle rules

updated.description: Last update date (YYYY-MM-DD) — used for staleness calculation

archived.description: Whether this page has been archived

supersedes.description: List of page names this supersedes

superseded_by.description: Name of page that supersedes this one

ingested_by.description: Person or agent that ingested this evidence

sanitized.description: Whether prompt-injection or unsafe instructions were sanitized before curation

valid_from.description: When this knowledge became valid in the real world

invalidated_at.description: When this knowledge stopped being valid in the real world

invalidated_by.description: Page or evidence that invalidated this item
